chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1791 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.7078/25 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA No.7079/25 (EX/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 23.10.2025 Syed Tanveer Abass Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Sub-Inspector Mir Muhammad, NCCI Circle Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Counsel for the petitioner was confronted regarding maintainability of the petition. In response, counsel does not press the instant petition on the ground that he will avail proper remedy, before proper forum. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
